meta.title: World-Model Substrate — Where We're At
meta.description: The predictive half of the Lev kernel: what's built, what's next, and what it actually is.

props.title: The World-Model Substrate
props.subtitle: Your AI only thinks when the world changes in a way that matters — and keeps a receipt for everything.

props.content: Two packages merged into main. The loop is green, the belief-carrier is green, and every decision it makes — or skips — replays to a byte-identical answer no matter which model is plugged in.

props.label: THE IDEA
props.title: What it is in one breath

props.content:
Most AI agents are *busy* — they re-poll, re-embed, and re-reason on a clock whether or not anything changed. This inverts that. Every change to the world passes three gates, cheapest-first: **is it legal? → did anything that matters actually change? → is it surprising enough to act on?** A skip at any gate is ~free. Pass all three and the agent acts and seals a tamper-evident receipt.

The "surprise" judge is a swappable world-model the loop **never trusts** — feed it garbage and it safely re-renders. Cost tracks *genuine novelty*, not polling frequency.
Where the Constraint Manifold decides what may run, the World-Model Substrate decides what is worth running — and proves it.

props.label: THE MECHANISM
props.title: Three gates, cheapest first
props.subtitle: A skip short-circuits the rest. Render only when all three pass.

props.title: G1 · Admissible?
props.content: May this run at all? Pure structural check. **Free.**

props.title: G3 · Surprising?
props.content: Predictor returns ONE non-negative scalar. Past threshold ⇒ act. **Expensive.**

props.title: → Render + Receipt
props.content: Patch the belief graph, seal a content-addressed receipt that supersedes its predecessor. Keyless replay forever.

Sort of — but not from a product called "Reactor." *"Reactor"* was **our own conversational codename** for this early on (the v1 doc was literally `design-world-model-reactor-program.md`). We deliberately **scrubbed it from canon** — naming a thing after a chat metaphor is exactly the conversational-artifact firewall you insisted on — and renamed it for what it actually is: the **Reconciliation Substrate**.

The *shape* is genuinely reactor-like (observation → gated dispatch), but the real lineage is a synthesis of five deeper sources, not a CLI clone:

rows: Scrubbed — it was a metaphor; the firewall renamed it to what it is
Observation → gated dispatch is genuinely reactor-shaped
Skip work whose inputs didn't change → G2 materiality
Act to reduce surprise — but classical math swapped for quantum info
Belief = attractor basin; corrupted input relaxes to nearest truth

props.label: SHIPPED
props.title: What we built — all green on main

rows: The loop + 3 gates + receipt chain. Zero deps; knows no physics.
Quantum-info belief state — ρ / nested-PEPS-2D / spinor over the basin
Carrier-derived surprise behind the scalar seam (composition root deferred)
S8 entanglement gate demoted — probe proved the band empty
Product def + NORTH_STAR / MANIFESTO / VISION / ROADMAP
Bind the predictor into G3 — flips the PM-1 xfail → green. The last mile of the value path.
≥2 representations (dense-ρ vs nested-PEPS-2D) proven over one basin semantics
Cache-freshness · deno+browser matrix · admit-binding · prior-state store

props.title: The keystone is lev-a6mm
props.content: Everything else is hardening. lev-a6mm is the one task that turns the v0 predictor from "built but unwired" into the live G3 judge — that's the move that makes the substrate earn its keep in a real loop.

props.label: THE HORIZON
props.title: The next 4 features — each ~2× the wow
props.subtitle: replay → many minds → modeled minds → self-directing minds. They compound.

props.title: ① Counterfactual Holodeck · 2×
props.content: Fork the receipt chain at any point, inject a what-if observation, replay forward deterministically. *"What would it have believed if this fact were false?"* → audit-by-counterfactual, synthetic training data, time-travel debugging.

props.title: ② Shared-Mind Mesh · 4×
props.content: N agents reconcile against **one** content-addressed world-model. Supersede-CAS guarantees a single linear truth, no forks. A team of agents that provably share one mind — consensus by physics, not a database lock.

props.title: ③ Avatars · 8×
props.content: Point the carrier at a person's output stream → a **queryable, falsifiable model of them**. Expresses uncertainty and contested beliefs (basin occupancy), not just plausible text. The only honest way to do an avatar: one you can interrogate.

props.title: ④ Active Inference · 16×
props.content: Close the loop. The agent acts to minimize its *expected future* surprise — choosing what to poll, refresh, and ask, to learn fastest. **Curiosity becomes a control law.** Set-it-and-forget-it, made physical.

items.title: First-principles re-derivation (46-agent interview↔arch loop)
items.content: Global max ambiguity 4.3%; "Reactor" scrubbed; 5 live defects surfaced with file:line.

items.title: 6-round adversarial critic → APPROVED
items.content: 0 blockers, 0 majors; critic ran its own 50k-state physics probe.

items.title: WM-9 v0 + cross-runtime replay spike
items.content: Node == Bun byte-identical; pt-witness demotion proven.

items.title: Ontology reconciliation
items.content: Basin = the invariant object; ρ / PEPS / spinor are co-equal representations.

items.title: Canon promotion
items.content: Product def threaded into vision / manifesto / north-star / roadmap.

items.title: Merged to main + synced
items.content: 715baf580 on origin/main; nothing stashed for later.

items.title: lev-a6mm — wire predictor into G3 (flip PM-1 green)

props.content:
Today's agents *generate*. This substrate lets them **believe, prove, share, model, and seek** — each layer a strict superset of the last. The four features aren't a roadmap of chores; they're four doublings of one idea.

Canon: `docs/design/world-model-substrate-product-definition.md` · engineering design `design-world-model-reconciliation-substrate.md` · workstream `world-model`.
